column10: GPT Image 1 rendered the white embroidery on the mustard kurti exceptionally well. Very clean.
Gemini Preview had stunning fabric rendering and realism. Pink anarkali folds were natural.
GPT model is highly ready for e-commerce. Clean lighting and accurate outfit colors.
Gemini Flash had surprising realism in the face and pose for Prompt 2.
GPT Image 1 models had the most accurate embroidery patterns for Indian clothing styles.
Saree zari gold border looked outstanding in GPT Image 1.
Gemini Preview outperformed others in jewelry, hair rendering, and fabric textures.
GPT model is very stable and predictable.
Embroidery thread textures on Gemini Preview models look actual, not pixelated.
